positive: A mystical forest scene featuring stylized woodland creatures like deer, fox, and owls, rendered in a detailed line art illustration style with abstract botanical elements. The design should have a strong, symmetrical composition suitable for a circular patch or centered apparel print. Use a limited, earthy color palette (deep emerald, burnt orange, sage green, cream) with high contrast negative space. The style should evoke whimsical engraving mixed with contemporary digital ink drawing. Clean, crisp lines, minimalist yet complex detailing, designed for clear printing on fabric. The composition must be centered and visually balanced.
negative: blur, artifact, text, watermark, low detail, noisy, grainy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, signature, logo, writing, disfigured
